CVE-2019-13616.title: SDL (Simple DirectMedia Layer) through 1.2.15 and 2.x through 2.0 ...
CVE-2019-13616.summary: SDL (Simple DirectMedia Layer) through 1.2.15 and 2.x through 2.0.9 has a heap-based buffer over-read in BlitNtoN in video/SDL_blit_N.c when called from SDL_SoftBlit in video/SDL_blit.c.
